title: Race in naming build containers causes build failures
body:
**Description**
The concurrent buildah bud script in podman issue https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1146#issuecomment-420428372 sometimes fails to build an image and logs the following error:

`error creating build container: error creating container: the container name "centos-working-container-2" is already in use by "f5bda7beecec6896b09eea6d406d733199a4f8b98afc9150fdac4f883f59cdce". You have to remove that container to be able to reuse that name.: that name is already in use`

The code seems to have a race when choosing an incremented name suffix, between checking for a unique name and claiming that name, it may have been claimed by another buildah bud run.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Run http://paste.openstack.org/show/729907/ with concurrency=4
2. Keep running until the above error is logged (hoping you don't hit https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1146 )

**Output of `buildah version`:**
buildah version 1.4-dev (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)
(local build of git master ref 08c56308c)

comments.body: This is also fixed by pull request #1009
